{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":635},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7507709175345857304","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这书写得可以，诙谐有趣，有些小瑕疵无伤大雅。但是没想到评分这么低，哪些狗屁倒灶的反而上了热推和高分榜。啧，还好让我无意中发现这本书了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748041430,"group_id":"7459967037465447448","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxQ347OayW7/j3fg9ab0Nr1NINhRp3jn1SXgwYRKfRvL","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d4eb41d584a343d0af24d08727180cbc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792921&x-signature=fiw61avp4dk%2FuQEQ1zqYF8%2F5rO8%3D","user_id":"4022470181659259","user_name":"过秦川"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4022470181659259","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459967037465447448","book_info":{"abstract":"【科举种田】+【家长里短】+【发家致富】+【腹黑】+【古代架空】
现代非遗爱好者陆启霖意外穿了。
一觉醒来，成了村里娘早逝，爹失踪的八岁小傻子。
不过好在爷奶与大伯夫妻对他真心疼爱，两个堂哥对他真切关爱，尚不算天崩开局。
奈何，家里两个叔叔接连搞事。
外头，还有奸佞小人暗害兄长。
村内，不怀好意者蠢蠢欲动中。
原想躺平的陆启霖决定不再摆烂，拍案而起。
“我要读书！”
他要利用过目不忘的“金手指”，一步步带飞全家。
衣，穿衣，穿锦衣。
饭，吃饭，吃好饭。
宅，住宅，住大宅。
且看他如何科举连中六元，扶摇直上九万里！
此文慢热温馨诙谐,渐入佳境。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/080e0441e82dc50e2b5f217830f900de","author":"方锦溪","author_id":"","book_id":"7459967037465447448","book_name":"从傻儿到文圣，我靠科举单开族谱","book_short_name":"麒麟状元","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d0c8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7459967745686241816","read_count":"29784","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1739390"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"846","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,腹黑,单女主,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f6ba1b0be5ca11ab09d4bc5f623d7c10~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446094&x-signature=s4Wf2euJZG6ewvvj5kCZhgCbC3c%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"93900158437","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"268"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读16小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4886,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":56142,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":14035},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1748053521,"author_reply_time":1748257778,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7481663982588691224","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很有人情味的一家人，大郎为小六筹划，深谋远虑值得一赞，主人公的第一桶金是卖簪花，希望与以往的穿越剧不同，不要那种大开大合的做买卖，又无所不能的，现在只阅读几十章还不错，再往后看看如何"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741963843,"group_id":"7459967037465447448","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新欢自然随性，走遍中国，环游世界","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2h64So6y7TR0jZdG6zj5l4=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792384&x-signature=KUBTWgwKQKH0JBy2IKzfz54hBDI%3D","user_id":"817689886473200","user_name":"毛毛亲亲宝贝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"817689886473200","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459967037465447448","book_info":{"abstract":"【科举种田】+【家长里短】+【发家致富】+【腹黑】+【古代架空】

author":0,"author_digg_time":1742003766,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7588448515421881112","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情之力可真厉害啊，祭祖这段，坏人如有神助，主角这边关键时身边人全都有理由不在，直接敲晕绑走，然后主角也是神勇，8岁小身板能在水下靠一把小剪子反杀成年壮汉，能独自一人带走一个昏迷的成年女人，能徒手（或靠一把小剪子？）造一张木笺…然后终于引出“山中人”顺利进入死士谋反剧情…反正经过这一出，后面主角的8岁日常忽然就看不进去了，留评走人。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766826550,"group_id":"7459967037465447448","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"今天又活过了颓废的一天呢","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4gqqYdqzmXhE1fN3Hxb87o=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"16091401477","user_name":"生又何欢，死又不敢"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"16091401477","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459967037465447448","book_info":{"abstract":"【科举种田】+【家长里短】+【发家致富】+【腹黑】+【古代架空】

or":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7546753878726279998","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太好看了，这评分不太科学啊！…这人物饱满，剧情跌宕。之前看了有很多类似的种田科举文，一旦利用现代知识和自身能力考出功名，就一直围绕主角扩张版图，很少有像作者写的，会有朝廷上的其他事，有很多谋算方面的剧情，不烧脑但也不幼稚……让我看着又回忆起以前看琅琊榜的日子，剧情安排的太好了，节奏也不拖沓[哭][哭][哭]一想到快看完目前章节我就有些不舍得看了，作者加油更啊啊！！我最近的精神粮食！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757119477,"group_id":"7459967037465447448","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"为什么找到好看的文全部连载中啊啊啊我恨","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzRspuVbSbGf0Y3ebzDG9Sjr1wk8swA31gj+439KKq+9","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9c72cd92a7754160a39d1f6cc910e3d7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790371&x-signature=hm%2B5vTL95dQqG6eEw5mP7bxPPIQ%3D","user_id":"3635406898734860","user_name":"究极恭喜发财无聊博士"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3635406898734860","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459967037465447448","book_info":{"abstract":"【科举种田】+【家长里短】+【发家致富】+【腹黑】+【古代架空】

uthor":0,"author_digg_time":1757121017,"author_reply_time":1757121008,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7565415624504623897","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看 是我近期看的穿越科举上位文最好的之一，喜欢里头的各种人物各种小老头陆家大房三房男主兄弟们的生活点滴，温馨感人 连男配太子和皇帝人物都不单薄，不容易啊"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761462682,"group_id":"7459967037465447448","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N045MA8rIsmCObnZJwnW3tA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/14c56e647ee34a2296964fe363375241~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793722&x-signature=76Tg6i7WsT0A6mmq4qD2vVZ%2BlV0%3D","user_id":"110546305962","user_name":"阿喵的任意门"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110546305962","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459967037465447448","book_info":{"abstract":"【科举种田】+【家长里短】+【发家致富】+【腹黑】+【古代架空】
现代非遗爱好者陆启霖意外穿了。
一觉醒来，成了村里娘早逝，爹失踪的八岁小傻子。
不过好在爷奶与大伯夫妻对他真心疼爱，两个堂哥对他真切关爱，尚不算天崩开局。
奈何，家里两个叔叔接连搞事。
外头，还有奸佞小人暗害兄长。
村内，不怀好意者蠢蠢欲动中。
原想躺平的陆启霖决定不再摆烂，拍案而起。
“我要读书！”
他要利用过目不忘的“金手指”，一步步带飞全家。
衣，穿衣，穿锦衣。
饭，吃饭，吃好饭。
宅，住宅，住大宅。
且看他如何科举连中六元，扶摇直上九万里！
此文慢热温馨诙谐,渐入佳境。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/080e0441e82dc50e2b5f217830f900de","author":"方锦溪","author_id":"","book_id":"7459967037465447448","book_name":"从傻儿到文圣，我靠科举单开族谱","book_short_name":"麒麟状元","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d0c8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7459967745686241816","read_count":"29784","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1739390"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"846","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,腹黑,单女主,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f6ba1b0be5ca11ab09d4bc5f623d7c10~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446094&x-signature=s4Wf2euJZG6ewvvj5kCZhgCbC3c%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"93900158437","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"487"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读27小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":95465,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5907},"user_action":{"author or":0,"author_digg_time":1754103370,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7513884164526539545","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"人物很鲜活，尤其大哥这个人物形象塑造的很有个人魅力，主角跟亲人间的互动也很温情，但有些情节比较老套，比如一家子兄弟各自被大儒、神医、武艺高强的护卫收为徒弟，还结识了皇子；极品又蠢又坏，不过这些也能忍受吧，让人无语的是主角剽窃古人诗词这个事，其实也不反对做文抄公，但用前人诗词总得符合人物的阅历、年龄吧，8岁的主角写“醉后不知天在水，满船清梦压星河”，获得众人夸赞，还夺得诗魁…呃……"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749466351,"group_id":"7459967037465447448","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+Hu1Tq9z805FXsgQA2rHDkLKZzOZrWgp5BfMYE00Gxh","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f2cdb89a435f464ab373b6e1624067a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796770&x-signature=PAdrN%2FTUl%2FBL9174QKA2cC3kJLQ%3D","user_id":"2458149589889662","user_name":"喜欢红海星的绝剑尊者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2458149589889662","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1746714383,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459967037465447448","book_info":{"abstract":"【科举种田】+【家长里短】+【发家致富】+【腹黑】+【古代架空】

hor":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7485377174620439320","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得真的可以，内容正常不夸张不狗血，男主包括男配等各个角色塑造都很不错，我还挺喜欢看比较详细的剧情故事，偏日常没有写成编年史真是深得我心，我甚至希望男主慢点长大，推荐观看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742825970,"group_id":"7459967037465447448","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3iAM7JpttFVolnfAF/YIEg=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5a342ce54ae845cd83f3cb24b25e4c0e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789230&x-signature=6rXIGw1FdFKWncVC%2FehzOBgPSNk%3D","user_id":"50255545413","user_name":"哈哈拔剑吧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"50255545413","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1780418750,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7459967037465447448","book_info":{"abstract":"【科举种田】+【家长里短】+【发家致富】+【腹黑】+【古代架空】
现代非遗爱好者陆启霖意外穿了。
一觉醒来，成了村里娘早逝，爹失踪的八岁小傻子。
不过好在爷奶与大伯夫妻对他真心疼爱，两个堂哥对他真切关爱，尚不算天崩开局。
奈何，家里两个叔叔接连搞事。
外头，还有奸佞小人暗害兄长。
村内，不怀好意者蠢蠢欲动中。
原想躺平的陆启霖决定不再摆烂，拍案而起。
“我要读书！”
他要利用过目不忘的“金手指”，一步步带飞全家。
衣，穿衣，穿锦衣。
饭，吃饭，吃好饭。
宅，住宅，住大宅。
且看他如何科举连中六元，扶摇直上九万里！
此文慢热温馨诙谐,渐入佳境。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/080e0441e82dc50e2b5f217830f900de","author":"方锦溪","author_id":"","book_id":"7459967037465447448","book_name":"从傻儿到文圣，我靠科举单开族谱","book_short_name":"麒麟状元","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d0c8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7459967745686241816","read_count":"29784","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1739390"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"846","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,腹黑,单女主,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f6ba1b0be5ca11ab09d4bc5f623d7c10~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446094&x-signature=s4Wf2euJZG6ewvvj5kCZhgCbC3c%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"93900158437","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"109"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":21,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12589,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":35701},"user_action":{"autho
